scope: Compact summary and compact boundary TUI cells rendered after conversation compaction

requiredBehaviors: renders the summarized-conversation heading when summarizeMetadata is present
renders the message count with up-to-this-point and from-this-point direction text in prompt mode
renders optional user context in smart quotes
shows the transcript expansion hint in prompt mode
shows the full compact summary text in transcript mode
renders the compact-summary fallback heading when summarizeMetadata is absent
shows the expansion hint only outside transcript mode
shows the full compact summary text in transcript mode
uses the configured transcript shortcut display with ctrl+o fallback
Message.tsx dispatches compact summary and compact boundary messages through the compact component directory

equivalenceNotes: CompactBoundaryMessage.tsx is byte-equivalent to the pinned donor source after relocation.
CompactSummary.tsx differs from the pinned donor source only by AgenC-owned relative import paths and existing upstream-import comments on dependencies owned by later purge items.
